calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Continued To Nov-14-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryan Silverman, Esq. 415-981-0550 of Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski for Defendant ENPHASE ENERGY, INC., BORREGO SOLAR SYSTEMS, INC. through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ENPHASE ENERGY, INC., BORREGO SOLAR SYSTEMS, INC.'S Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Enphase Energy, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration is GRANTED. Plaintiff filed a statement of non-opposition.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)

MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryan Silverman, Esq. 415-981-0550 of Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski for Defendant ENPHASE ENERGY, INC., BORREGO SOLAR SYSTEMS, INC. through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ENPHASE ENERGY, INC., BORREGO SOLAR SYSTEMS, INC.'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING ARBITRATION.

Enphase Energy, Inc.'s motion to stay is GRANTED. Plaintiff filed a statement of non-opposition.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
